title: Super Checkout Installation
subtitle: Set up your payment system in minutes.
access_denied_desc: This installer can only be accessed via a secure link generated by the administrative panel.

license.title: Validate License
license.desc: Enter your license key to validate usage.
license.label: License Key

database.title: Create Database
database.desc: Create your project on Supabase and connect it here.
database.step1_desc: Click to open Supabase and create a new project (Free).
database.step2_desc: Go to: Project Settings > Data API > Copy the URL field
database.connecting_desc: We are configuring your project and database.

migrations.title: Create Tables
migrations.desc: Run the SQL script to structure your database.
migrations.sql_desc: Paste into Supabase SQL Editor and execute.

keys.title: Access Keys
keys.desc: Copy keys from Supabase in Project Settings > API.

deploy.title: Publish on Vercel
deploy.desc: Create your site automatically on Vercel.
deploy.step1: 1. Copy and paste these keys when deploying:
deploy.already_deployed: I already deployed, I want to configure

vercel_config.title: Post-Deploy Configuration
vercel_config.desc: Add these variables in the Vercel panel to activate the system.
vercel_config.info: Add variables in: Project Settings > Environment Variables
vercel_config.final_step: Paste your site URL to finish (Ex: my-store.vercel.app)

success.title: Installation Completed!
success.desc: Congratulations! Your Super Checkout is configured.

errors.domain_required: Please paste the domain (URL) of your project on Vercel.
errors.activation_failed: Failed to activate license on final domain.
errors.bypass_auth_failed: Access denied: Login required for update.
